inputs.label: Total Energy Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Annual electrical energy used by the facility (ISO 50001).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual electrical energy used by the facility (ISO 50001).

inputs.label: Primary Energy Source
inputs.businessContext: The dominant source of electricity (grid mix, solar, wind, natural gas).

businessContext_i18n.en: The dominant source of electricity (grid mix, solar, wind, natural gas).

inputs.label: Fossil Fuel Consumption (Fleet & Heating)
inputs.businessContext: Total diesel, gasoline, or heating oil used annually (Scope 1 emissions).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total diesel, gasoline, or heating oil used annually (Scope 1 emissions).

inputs.label: Total Waste Generated
inputs.businessContext: Annual waste sent to landfill or incineration (WERC guidelines).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual waste sent to landfill or incineration (WERC guidelines).

inputs.label: Recycling Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of waste that is recycled or composted (Lean green metrics).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of waste that is recycled or composted (Lean green metrics).

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total units produced per year (for intensity-based benchmarking).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total units produced per year (for intensity-based benchmarking).

inputs.label: Average Transport Distance per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average distance raw materials or finished goods travel (logistics carbon).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average distance raw materials or finished goods travel (logistics carbon).

inputs.label: Active Carbon Offset Program
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if the organization purchases verified carbon credits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if the organization purchases verified carbon credits.

rules.message: For grid mix or coal, ensure emission factors are up to date (IPCC guidelines).
Recycling rate must be between 0 and 100 percent.

thresholds.message: Total carbon footprint exceeds 10,000 tCO2e. Immediate reduction strategy required.
Recycling rate below 20% — consider Lean waste reduction initiatives.
Energy intensity per unit > 2.5 kWh — investigate Six Sigma energy waste.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
